titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Department of History, Yale University, Student Records
Department of History, Yale University, Student Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday November 7, 2020 at 11:03

did.unittitle: Department of History, Yale University, student records
did.abstract: The records consist of student records of the Yale Department of History.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 14-B (YRG 14-B), Records of academic departments and programs of the Yale Faculty of Arts and Sciences.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the Department of History, 2003, 2009, 2013, 2014 and 2020.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Department of History, Yale University, Student Records (RU 932) Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged chronologically, alphabetically thereunder.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of student records of the Yale Department of History.

did.unittitle: Graduate student records for the Class of 1995
